metadata.title: States PCS: Odisha GK & General Studies for OPSC and other Odisha Exams

questions.question: Integrated Mines and Minerals Management System (i3MS) Project was introduced in which year?
questions.explanation: i3MS project was introduced in 2010. It aims to introduce a transparent and effective management system for smooth operation.

questions.question: The National Aluminium Company Limited (NALCO) of Odisha gets its coal supply from which place?
questions.explanation: NALCO is situated at Daminjodi (Koraput district). It gets coal supply from Talcher.

questions.question: Which of the following varieties of silk is less popular in Odisha
questions.explanation: Sericulture started in Odisha in 1926. Mulberry is less popular in Odisha with compare to Eri and Tassar.

questions.question: Which among the following is/ are correct about the Biju Saharanchal Vidyutikaran Yojana of Odisha?1. It was launched in 2010-11.2. It aims to provide electricity to unelectrified areas3. Unelectrified villages with a population not less than 100 will be covered4. BPL household electrificationChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Biju Saharanchal Vidyutikaran Yojana of Odisha- It was launched in 2010-11, It aims to provide electricity to unelectrified areas of Urban area, Unelectrified villages with a population not less than 100 and BPL household will be covered.

questions.question: The headquarter of the East coast railway zone is situated in which city of Odisha?
questions.explanation: There are a total 18 railway zones in India. The headquarter of the East coast railway zone is situated in Bhubaneswar.

questions.question: How many zones of Southeastern railway lies in Odisha?
questions.explanation: The southeastern railway consists of eight zones. Two of them (Sambalpur, Khurdha) lies in Odisha.

questions.question: Which of the following is the cheapest mode of transportation?
questions.explanation: Water transportation is the cheapest mode of transportation. Water transport s responsible for 1% of the total transport in India.

questions.question: Who started the monthly magazine Satyavadi?
questions.explanation: Gopabandhu das started the magazine Satyavadi from Berhampur.

questions.question: What is the name of the first English magazine of Odisha?
questions.explanation: The name of the first English magazine of Odisha is Rock Pebbles. This magazine was published in 1987 from Jajpur.

questions.question: A popular magazine for children Nandan Kanan was published in which year?
questions.explanation: Popular Odiya magazine Nandan Kanan was published in 1988.
